channel.title: Seal Security — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Seal Security (seal).

item.title: CVE-2024-12905 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ("Link Following") and Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ("Path Traversal"). This vulnerability occurs when extracting a maliciously crafted tar file, which can result in unauth…
